message.content:
(1) PASS - The ESGic logo is centered horizontally at the top of the sidebar.  
(2) PASS - There is no 'ESGic' text next to the logo; only the logo is present.  
(3) PASS - There is no 'ADMINISTRATEUR' label text above the nav items.  
(4) PASS - The logo is enlarged and clearly visible (approximately 40px tall).  
(5) PASS - The nav items start directly below the logo.  

The sidebar top section features a centered, enlarged ESGic logo (no accompanying text) at the top, with navigation items (e.g., "Tableau de bord", "Étudiants", etc.) beginning immediately below the logo.
